name: cloudguard-waf
description: CloudGuard WAF MCP server for Check Point WAF management

options.description: CloudGuard WAF client ID for authentication
CloudGuard WAF access key for authentication
CloudGuard WAF region (EU, US, AU, IN, AE, CA, DEV, or STG)

Enable write operations. By default the server runs in read-only mode: only get_objects, get_enforcement_status, and waf_consultant are available, and GraphQL mutations are blocked. Pass --allow-writes or set WAF_ALLOW_WRITES=true to also expose manage_objects and publish_and_enforce.
